{{CargoClone
|name=Dragon Jr.
|rank=purple
|cabin=2
|id=56
|gene1={race} HP +300
|gene2={race} ART +30
|gene3=Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:
> Troop HP +80
|gene4=Micro Incubator: Convert Blue product to Purple by + 0.2%
|gene5=Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:
> Troop HP +120
|gene6=Micro Incubator: Convert Blue product to Purple by + 0.3%
|}}
